clusters.label: User Friendly Interface
sample_quotes: Quite Smooth and easy to use app for share market investment

it has a good app for new stock traders but I learn many things from it and I also found a wrong that it can not be used as mutual fund properly i thought that they have to provide a seperate app for it

I've had a great experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs very convenient, even for beginners. The interface is clean, transactions are smooth, and account management is hassle-free. I also appreciate the timely notifications, easy-to-understand investment insights, and quick customer support. Overall, Groww is a reliable platform for anyone looking to start or grow their investment journey. Highly recommended!

very good app for trading my trading experience very good in this app,915 tarminal is best for F&O,SLand TP drag on chart very easy, swastik sir recomend to me groww 915 app for use,my experience is best with her
very good app for trading f&O and stocks Trading and stock by or sell and all perpus for daily earning
Good app, Some important additional information to be added if possible

clusters.label: App Stability Issues
sample_quotes: Earlier financial performance chart was goold but now new chart version is not that upto mark

please add Quarterly and yearly time frame in chart, it's very important,for all traders and investors. Add midline in rectangle in tool section and colour Bar ka colour change karne ke bad Time frame badlne par fir wahi purana wala colour bar aa jata hai.isko fix karo pahle.

App interface is bad after this latest update. in mutual fund Dashboard section daily and overall profit were shown in Green Colour and Loss were Shown in Red Colour Font. Which was very convenient and clear. But after update Both Profit and Loss are showing in White colour font which is very confusing. Before this we were able to find profit and Loss very easily, only by seeing green & red colour. But not now. I request you to please Fix this issue as soon as possible.
previous format of revenue and profit is displayed by the company much better than the present format please provide previous format of revenue and profit

firstly, the latest version of app has deteriorated the home page user interface by squeezing the rise and fall of daily various indices trend placed at the top that display ed both points and percentage change together. Restore the older layout as soon as possible secondly, change in the display of financial statements like revenue and profits looks outdated , messy, confusing when compared to the previous designs and patterns
Dear Grow Team, Kindly Add Countdown Timer in Trading view chart....

pulse.summary: Users flagged friction across the top themes this week. Investigate the most-cited issues and prioritise fixes for the next sprint.
pulse.recommendation: Investigate and patch the user friendly interface issues (39 reviews) before next release.

feedback.text: Quite Smooth and easy to use app for share market investment
Earlier financial performance chart was goold but now new chart version is not that upto mark

they are charges too much brokerages.. and customer care not respond properly.. mera 35050 amount inlogo ki wajah se hold ho gaya ye claim karte hai instant receive but mujhe 27 hours ho gaya wo bhi working days par fir bhi amount receive nahi huva.. third class service.. customer ke paise hold kar dete hai small amount instant received ho jata hai jaise hi aap big amount withdrawal karoge hold ho jayega.. i suggest don't use it switched to other platform..

bhot bekar app hai jb koi call saste pr buy lrne jao to ye lpg order cencle kr dete hai or markit price pr bhi buy nahi hota hai bhot bekar service hai inki costumer care bhi support nahi krte main to kahunga inke yha demate account bnd krke kisi or app main open kre bhot bekar aap hai

bullets: Stock delivery trades on Groww incur Rs 20 or 0.1% (whichever is lower) per executed order. [1]
Intraday and F&O trades are charged Rs 20 per executed order, plus statutory levies. [3]
Mutual funds direct plans on Groww have zero commission and no transaction fees. [2]
Exit load is a mutual-fund-house charge for redeeming units inside the lock-in window — Groww does not earn this. [2]
Demat AMC for stock investors is billed annually after the first year, separate from per-trade brokerage. [3]
GST, SEBI turnover fee, STT and stamp duty are statutory levies passed through unchanged on every trade. [3]

anomalies.label: Feature Enhancement Requests
anomalies.note: Dropped out of top themes (was n=18 last week).

decision.move: Patch the crash hotspots before next release
decision.why: "App Stability Issues" jumped 146% WoW (n 13 → 32, avg ★2.3). It's 6% of weekly review volume.
decision.impact: Addresses ~6% of weekly review volume (32 reviews) — projected NPS impact +3.5
